subcodes.first_line: The Tablets of destiny have been ordained in the heaven of divine decree, and though We sent them not forth by reason of wisdom, We shall assuredly dispatch them when He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قدر فی سماء التقدیر الواح القضا و ماارسلناها لحکمه فسوف نرسلها اذا شاء
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
